description: A White House designed announcement graphic. The top two-thirds is a high-resolution photograph of President Donald Trump speaking at a lectern (presidential seal partially visible on the podium front), wearing a navy suit, white shirt and red tie, addressing a microphone, with an American flag and blue drapery behind him. Overlaid in large bold white condensed serif caps across the lower portion of the photo is the headline 'RUSSIA-UKRAINE CEASEFIRE.' Below sits a reproduced Truth Social / @realDonaldTrump post (avatar with US-flag profile, verified check) whose full text is rendered on a white card with key sentences highlighted in yellow: 'I am pleased to announce that there will be a THREE DAY CEASEFIRE (May 9th, 10th, and 11th) in the War between Russia and Ukraine. The Celebration in Russia is for Victory Day but, likewise, in Ukraine, because they were also a big part and factor of World War II. This Ceasefire will include a suspension of all kinetic activity, and also a prison swap of 1,000 prisoners from each Country. This request was made directly by me, and I very much appreciate its agreement by President Vladimir Putin and President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. Hopefully, it is the beginning of the end of a very long, deadly, and hard fought War. Talks are continuing on ending this Major Conflict, the biggest since World War II, and we are getting closer and closer every day. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP.' At the bottom is a small White House mansion logo with 'The WHITE HOUSE.' The technique repackages a presidential social-media post as an official statesman-like communique, casting Trump as a personal peacemaker; intent is to project foreign-policy strength and credit to a general/patriotic audience.
notable_text: RUSSIA-UKRAINE CEASEFIRE; THREE DAY CEASEFIRE (May 9th, 10th, and 11th); The WHITE HOUSE
